accessPreconditions.item: Stable auth/session context before route sweep
accessPreconditions.evidence: Validation now enforces login + select-company fallback handling before each module check.
Navigation requires opening drawer state before tab/group selection at 390/768.

accessPreconditions.item: Delivery paths are nested under Inventory tools menu
accessPreconditions.evidence: Routes are considered reachable only if inventory tools toggle renders and delivery actions are present.
